en: "Then the kingdom of heaven will be like ten virgins who took their lamps and went to meet the bridegroom.
zh: “那時，天國好像十個童女，拿著她們的燈出去迎接新郎。

en: Five of them were foolish, and five were wise.
zh: 她們中間有五個是愚蠢的，五個是聰明的。

en: For when the foolish took their lamps, they took no oil with them,
zh: 那些愚蠢的拿著燈，卻沒有帶油；

en: but the wise took flasks of oil with their lamps.
zh: 但那些聰明的拿著燈，也把油裝在瓶裡帶來。

en: As the bridegroom was delayed, they all became drowsy and slept.
zh: 新郎很晚還沒有到，她們都打瞌睡，而且睡著了。

en: But at midnight there was a cry, 'Here is the bridegroom! Come out to meet him.'
zh: 半夜，有人喊叫：‘新郎來了，快出來迎接他。’

en: Then all those virgins rose and trimmed their lamps.
zh: 那些童女都醒過來，整理她們的燈。

en: And the foolish said to the wise, 'Give us some of your oil, for our lamps are going out.'
zh: 愚蠢的對聰明的說：‘請把你們的油分一點給我們，我們的燈快要滅了。’

en: But the wise answered, saying, 'Since there will not be enough for us and for you, go rather to the dealers and buy for yourselves.'
zh: 聰明的回答：‘這些恐怕不夠我們大家用，不如你們自己到賣油的地方去買吧！’

en: And while they were going to buy, the bridegroom came, and those who were ready went in with him to the marriage feast, and the door was shut.
zh: 她們去買油的時候，新郎來了；準備好了的童女就和他一同進去參加婚筵，門就關上了。

en: Afterward the other virgins came also, saying, 'Lord, lord, open to us.'
zh: 後來，其餘的童女也來到，說：‘主啊，主啊，給我們開門吧！’

en: But he answered, 'Truly, I say to you, I do not know you.'
zh: 新郎卻回答：‘我實在告訴你們，我不認識你們。’

en: Watch therefore, for you know neither the day nor the hour.
zh: 所以你們要警醒，因為不知道那日子和那時間。

en: "For it will be like a man going on a journey, who called his servants and entrusted to them his property.
zh: “天國又像一個人要出外遠行，就叫自己的僕人來，把產業交給他們。

en: To one he gave five talents, to another two, to another one, to each according to his ability. Then he went away.
zh: 他按照各人的才幹，一個給三萬個銀幣，一個給一萬二千個銀幣，一個給六千個銀幣 ，然後就遠行去了。

en: He who had received the five talents went at once and traded with them, and he made five talents more.
zh: 那領了三萬的馬上去做生意，另外賺了三萬。

en: So also he who had the two talents made two talents more.
zh: 那領了一萬二千的也是這樣，另賺了一萬二千。

en: But he who had received the one talent went and dug in the ground and hid his master's money.
zh: 但那領了六千的，卻去把地挖開，把主人的錢藏起來。

en: Now after a long time the master of those servants came and settled accounts with them.
zh: 過了很久，那些僕人的主人回來了，要和他們算帳。

en: And he who had received the five talents came forward, bringing five talents more, saying, 'Master, you delivered to me five talents; here I have made five talents more.'
zh: 那領了三萬個銀幣的，帶著另外的三萬前來，說：‘主啊，你交了三萬給我，你看，我又賺了三萬。’

en: His master said to him, 'Well done, good and faithful servant. You have been faithful over a little; I will set you over much. Enter into the joy of your master.'
zh: 主人對他說：‘又良善又忠心的僕人哪，你作得好！你既然在不多的事上忠心，我要派你管理許多的事。進來，享受你主人的快樂吧！’

en: And he also who had the two talents came forward, saying, 'Master, you delivered to me two talents; here I have made two talents more.'
zh: 那領了一萬二千的也前來，說：‘主啊，你交了一萬二千給我，你看，我又賺了一萬二千。’

en: His master said to him, 'Well done, good and faithful servant. You have been faithful over a little; I will set you over much. Enter into the joy of your master.'
zh: 主人對他說：‘又良善又忠心的僕人哪，你作得好！你既然在不多的事上忠心，我要派你管理許多的事。進來，享受你主人的快樂吧！’

en: He also who had received the one talent came forward, saying, 'Master, I knew you to be a hard man, reaping where you did not sow, and gathering where you scattered no seed,
zh: 那領了六千的也前來，說：‘主啊，我知道你是個嚴厲的人，沒有撒種的地方，你要收割；沒有散播的地方，你要收聚。

en: so I was afraid, and I went and hid your talent in the ground. Here you have what is yours.'
zh: 所以，我就害怕起來，去把你的錢藏在地裡。你看，你的錢還在這裡。’

en: But his master answered him, 'You wicked and slothful servant! You knew that I reap where I have not sowed and gather where I scattered no seed?
zh: 可是主人對他說：‘你這個又可惡又懶惰的僕人，你既然知道我要在沒有撒種的地方收割，在沒有散播的地方收聚，

en: Then you ought to have invested my money with the bankers, and at my coming I should have received what was my own with interest.
zh: 那你就應該把我的錢存入銀行，到我回來的時候，可以連本帶利收回。

en: So take the talent from him and give it to him who has the ten talents.
zh: 你們把他的六千銀幣拿去，交給那個有六萬的。

en: For to everyone who has will more be given, and he will have an abundance. But from the one who has not, even what he has will be taken away.
zh: 因為凡是有的，還要給他，他就充足有餘；凡是沒有的，就算他有甚麼也要拿去。

en: And cast the worthless servant into the outer darkness. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.'
zh: 把這沒有用的僕人丟在外面的黑暗裡，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。’

en: "When the Son of Man comes in his glory, and all the angels with him, then he will sit on his glorious throne.
zh: “當人子在他的榮耀裡，帶著所有的使者降臨的時候，他要坐在榮耀的寶座上。

en: Before him will be gathered all the nations, and he will separate people one from another as a shepherd separates the sheep from the goats.
zh: 萬族要聚集在他面前，他要把他們彼此分開，好像牧羊人把綿羊和山羊分開一樣：

en: And he will place the sheep on his right, but the goats on the left.
zh: 把綿羊放在右邊，山羊放在左邊。

en: Then the King will say to those on his right, 'Come, you who are blessed by my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world.
zh: 那時，王要對右邊的說：‘蒙我父賜福的，來承受創世以來為你們預備好的國吧。

en: For I was hungry and you gave me food, I was thirsty and you gave me drink, I was a stranger and you welcomed me,
zh: 因為我餓了，你們給我吃；我渴了，你們給我喝；我作旅客，你們接待我；

en: I was naked and you clothed me, I was sick and you visited me, I was in prison and you came to me.'
zh: 我赤身露體，你們給我衣服穿；我病了，你們看顧我；我在監裡，你們來看我。’

en: Then the righteous will answer him, saying, 'Lord, when did we see you hungry and feed you, or thirsty and give you drink?
zh: 義人就回答：‘主啊，我們甚麼時候見你餓了就給你吃，渴了就給你喝呢？

en: And when did we see you a stranger and welcome you, or naked and clothe you?
zh: 又甚麼時候見你作旅客就接待你，赤身露體就給你衣服穿呢？

en: And when did we see you sick or in prison and visit you?'
zh: 或者甚麼時候見你病了，或在監裡就來看你呢？’

en: And the King will answer them, 'Truly, I say to you, as you did it to one of the least of these my brothers, you did it to me.'
zh: 王要回答他們：‘我實在告訴你們，你們所作的，只要是作在我一個最小的弟兄身上，就是作在我的身上了。’

en: "Then he will say to those on his left, 'Depart from me, you cursed, into the eternal fire prepared for the devil and his angels.
zh: “王也要對左邊的說：‘你們這被咒詛的，離開我，到為魔鬼和他的使者所預備的永火裡去吧！

en: For I was hungry and you gave me no food, I was thirsty and you gave me no drink,
zh: 因為我餓了，你們沒有給我吃；我渴了，你們沒有給我喝；

en: I was a stranger and you did not welcome me, naked and you did not clothe me, sick and in prison and you did not visit me.'
zh: 我作旅客，你們沒有接待我；我赤身露體，你們沒有給我衣服穿；我病了，我在監裡，你們沒有看顧我。’

en: Then they also will answer, saying, 'Lord, when did we see you hungry or thirsty or a stranger or naked or sick or in prison, and did not minister to you?'
zh: 他們就回答：‘主啊，我們甚麼時候見你餓了、渴了、作旅客、赤身露體、病了，或在監裡，卻沒有服事你呢？’

en: Then he will answer them, saying, 'Truly, I say to you, as you did not do it to one of the least of these, you did not do it to me.'
zh: 王要回答他們：‘我實在告訴你們，這些事你們既然沒有作在一個最小的身上，就是沒有作在我的身上了。’

en: And these will go away into eternal punishment, but the righteous into eternal life."
zh: 他們要進入永遠的刑罰，義人卻要進入永生。”
